title: Tool Fallback Strategy
constraints: The primary search tool must be tried first
Fallback to the secondary search only when the primary fails or returns no results
The agent must not call both tools simultaneously on every query
Error messages from the primary tool must be caught, not surfaced raw to the user
hints: Wrap the primary tool call in error handling that catches exceptions and triggers the fallback
In LangGraph, model this as a conditional edge: if primary search fails, route to the backup search node
Consider having the primary tool return a sentinel value on failure so the agent knows to try the fallback

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

@tool
def primary_search(query: str) -> str:
    """Search using the primary search engine (sometimes fails)."""
    # BUG: This tool intermittently fails and there is no fallback
    import random
    if random.random() < 0.5:
        raise ConnectionError("Primary search service is temporarily unavailable")
    return f"Primary results for '{query}': Article about {query} from TechNews, Research paper on {query} from ArXiv"

@tool
def backup_search(query: str) -> str:
    """Search using the backup search engine (always works)."""
    return f"Backup results for '{query}': Blog post about {query}, Wikipedia article on {query}"

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a research assistant. Search for information to answer questions."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

# BUG: Only primary_search is registered — when it fails, the agent crashes
# TODO: Add fallback logic so backup_search is used when primary fails
agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [primary_search], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[primary_search])

result = executor.invoke({"input": "Find recent research on transformer architectures"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM
from crewai.tools import tool

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

@tool
def primary_search(query: str) -> str:
    """Search using the primary search engine (sometimes fails)."""
    # BUG: This tool intermittently fails and there is no fallback
    import random
    if random.random() < 0.5:
        raise ConnectionError("Primary search service is temporarily unavailable")
    return f"Primary results for '{query}': Article about {query} from TechNews, Research paper on {query} from ArXiv"

@tool
def backup_search(query: str) -> str:
    """Search using the backup search engine (always works)."""
    return f"Backup results for '{query}': Blog post about {query}, Wikipedia article on {query}"

# BUG: Only primary_search is registered — when it fails, the agent crashes
# TODO: Add fallback logic so backup_search is used when primary fails
agent = Agent(
    role="Research Assistant",
    goal="Search for information to answer questions",
    backstory="You are a research assistant. Search for information to answer questions.",
    tools=[primary_search],
    llm=llm,
)

task = Task(
    description="Find recent research on transformer architectures",
    expected_output="Search results about transformer architectures",
    agent=agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def primary_search(query: str) -> str:
    """Search using the primary search engine (sometimes fails)."""
    # BUG: This tool intermittently fails and there is no fallback
    import random
    if random.random() < 0.5:
        raise ConnectionError("Primary search service is temporarily unavailable")
    return f"Primary results for '{query}': Article about {query} from TechNews, Research paper on {query} from ArXiv"

@function_tool
def backup_search(query: str) -> str:
    """Search using the backup search engine (always works)."""
    return f"Backup results for '{query}': Blog post about {query}, Wikipedia article on {query}"

# BUG: Only primary_search is registered — when it fails, the agent crashes
# TODO: Add fallback logic so backup_search is used when primary fails
agent = Agent(
    name="Research Assistant",
    instructions="You are a research assistant. Search for information to answer questions.",
    tools=[primary_search],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Find recent research on transformer architectures")
print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Primary search is tried first
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent always attempts the primary search tool before considering the fallback

evaluationCriteria.label: Fallback triggers on failure
evaluationCriteria.description: When the primary search fails, the backup search is automatically called

evaluationCriteria.label: Agent never crashes
evaluationCriteria.description: Primary search failures are caught gracefully — the agent always returns a result

evaluationCriteria.label: No unnecessary double calls
evaluationCriteria.description: The backup is only called when the primary actually fails, not on every request
